message:
fix: eliminate FindRigBeadsDir TOCTOU race with atomic FindOrCreateRigBeadsDir (gt-k10wf)

Add FindOrCreateRigBeadsDir that combines directory resolution with creation,
eliminating the stat-then-use TOCTOU race where directory state can change
between FindRigBeadsDir's check and the caller's write operation.

- Add FindOrCreateRigBeadsDir for write callers (returns path + error)
- Update EnsureMetadata to use atomic resolve-and-create
- Update writeDoltMetadata in doctor to use atomic variant
- Update setSyncModeForAllRigs in cmd/dolt to use atomic variant
- Remove unused findRigBeadsDir wrapper in cmd/dolt.go
- Document TOCTOU limitation on read-only FindRigBeadsDir
- Add tests including concurrent caller safety

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
